### Post by PDAWG on 2008-09-16
okay have just installed Ubuntu 8.04, however i am unable to use thumb drives/portable hdds on the system.

i get the following error - 

Cannot Mount Volume
Invalid mount option when attempting to mount the volume.


here is my fstab

# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
#  -- This file has been automaticly generated by ntfs-config -- 
#
# <file system> <mount point>   <type>  <options>       <dump>  <pass>

proc /proc proc defaults 0 0
# Entry for /dev/sda1 :
UUID=9118c3d1-548e-4b60-a590-010d3059b052 / ext3 relatime,errors=remount-ro 0 1
# Entry for /dev/sda5 :
UUID=1006e39d-c375-40c9-adce-da478ea49a1d none swap sw 0 0
/dev/sdb1 /media/cdrom0 udf,iso9660 user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0
/dev/scd0 /media/cdrom1 udf,iso9660 user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0


would appreciate any help, thanks :)
